memberdef.definition: Result< std::unique_ptr< TableScanBuilder< ScanType > > > iceberg::TableScanBuilder< ScanType >::Make
memberdef.name: Make

briefdescription.para: Constructs a TableScanBuilder for the given table.

parameterdescription.para: FileIO instance for reading manifests files.

briefdescription.para: Update property that will override the table's behavior based on the incoming pair. Unknown properties will be ignored.

parameterdescription.para: name of the table property to be overridden

briefdescription.para: Set the projected schema.
If data columns are selected via Select(), controls whether the match to the schema will be done with case sensitivity. Default is true.
Request this scan to load the column stats with each data file.

detaileddescription.para: Column stats include: value count, null value count, lower bounds, and upper bounds.

briefdescription.para: Request this scan to load the column stats for the specific columns with each data file.

detaileddescription.para: Column stats include: value count, null value count, lower bounds, and upper bounds.

parameterdescription.para: column names for which to keep the stats.

briefdescription.para: Request this scan to read the given data columns.

detaileddescription.para: This produces an expected schema that includes all fields that are either selected or used by this scan's filter expression.

parameterdescription.para: column names from the table's schema

briefdescription.para: Set the expression to filter data.
Request data filtering to files but not to rows in those files.
Request this scan to return at least the given number of rows.

detaileddescription.para: This is used as a hint and is entirely optional in order to not have to return more rows than necessary. This may return fewer rows if the scan does not contain that many, or it may return more than requested.

parameterdescription.para: The minimum number of rows requested

briefdescription.para: Request this scan to use the given snapshot by ID.

simplesect.para: InvalidArgument will be returned if the snapshot cannot be found

briefdescription.para: Request this scan to use the given reference.

simplesect.para: InvalidArgument will be returned if a reference with the given name could not be found

briefdescription.para: Request this scan to use the most recent snapshot as of the given time in milliseconds on the branch in the scan or main if no branch is set.

simplesect.para: InvalidArgument will be returned if the snapshot cannot be found or time travel is attempted on a tag

briefdescription.para: Instructs this scan to look for changes starting from a particular snapshot.

detaileddescription.para: This method is only available for incremental scans. If the start snapshot is not configured, it defaults to the oldest ancestor of the end snapshot (inclusive).

parameterdescription.para: whether the start snapshot is inclusive, default is false

simplesect.para: InvalidArgument will be returned if the start snapshot is not an ancestor of the end snapshot

briefdescription.para: Instructs this scan to look for changes starting from a particular snapshot.

detaileddescription.para: This method is only available for incremental scans. If the start snapshot is not configured, it defaults to the oldest ancestor of the end snapshot (inclusive).

parameterdescription.para: the start ref name that points to a particular snapshot ID
whether the start snapshot is inclusive, default is false

simplesect.para: InvalidArgument will be returned if the start snapshot is not an ancestor of the end snapshot

briefdescription.para: Instructs this scan to look for changes up to a particular snapshot (inclusive).

detaileddescription.para: This method is only available for incremental scans. If the end snapshot is not configured, it defaults to the current table snapshot (inclusive).

briefdescription.para: Instructs this scan to look for changes up to a particular snapshot ref (inclusive).

detaileddescription.para: This method is only available for incremental scans. If the end snapshot is not configured, it defaults to the current table snapshot (inclusive).

briefdescription.para: Use the specified branch.

detaileddescription.para:
This method is only available for incremental scans.
branch
the branch name

briefdescription.para: Builds and returns a TableScan instance.

simplesect.para: A Result containing the TableScan or an error.

memberdef.definition: Result< std::reference_wrapper< const std::shared_ptr< Schema > > > iceberg::TableScanBuilder< ScanType >::ResolveSnapshotSchema
memberdef.name: ResolveSnapshotSchema

briefdescription.para: Builder class for creating TableScan instances.
